title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Walmart India Holdings Services! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Walmart India Holdings Services:
Walmart India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India Holdings Services!
